PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number PES-14-297811 The Estate of Pauline Williams.

Appearances: Peter Shelton in Propria Persona.

The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $150,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
